intents.label: GREETING
intents.name: GREETING
intents.description: User is greeting or saying hello

intents.label: FAQ_QUERY
intents.name: FAQ_QUERY
intents.description: User is asking a frequently asked question
examples: How do I reset my password?
Where can I find my order?

intents.label: ORDER_STATUS
intents.name: ORDER_STATUS
intents.description: User wants to check the status of their order

intents.label: REFUND_REQUEST
intents.name: REFUND_REQUEST
intents.description: User wants to request a refund
examples: Can I get my money back?
How do I request a refund?

intents.label: COMPLAINT
intents.name: COMPLAINT
intents.description: User has a complaint or issue
examples: I'm not happy with my order

intents.label: GENERAL_QUERY
intents.name: GENERAL_QUERY
intents.description: User has a general question or query
examples: Can you help me with something?

intents.label: GOODBYE
intents.name: GOODBYE
intents.description: User is saying goodbye or ending the conversation
